content: Microsoft 365 app publishing checklist (learn.microsoft.com/partner-center/marketplace-offers/checklist, updated 2025-09-25): submission takes 4-6 weeks, often multiple rounds. Steps: enroll in Microsoft 365 and Copilot Partner Center program; review certification policies (1100 Microsoft 365, 1120 Office Add-ins); validate manifest with office-addin-manifest; ensure ProviderName/developer.name matches Partner Center Publisher name; provide testing/certification notes with credentials; supply https:// support URL, privacy policy URL, and EULA URL (or accept MS standard EULA); fill out Marketplace listing (name, short/long description, icons, >=1 screenshot).
